runs_at_most_one_actor.name: runs_at_most_one_actor
runs_at_most_one_actor.value: NOT (user_id IS NOT NULL AND end_user_id IS NOT NULL)

connection_profiles_exactly_one_owner.name: connection_profiles_exactly_one_owner
connection_profiles_exactly_one_owner.value:
(
        (user_id IS NOT NULL AND end_user_id IS NULL AND application_id IS NULL) OR
        (user_id IS NULL AND end_user_id IS NOT NULL AND application_id IS NULL) OR
        (user_id IS NULL AND end_user_id IS NULL AND application_id IS NOT NULL)
      )

oauth_states_exactly_one_actor.name: oauth_states_exactly_one_actor
oauth_states_exactly_one_actor.value: (user_id IS NOT NULL AND end_user_id IS NULL) OR (user_id IS NULL AND end_user_id IS NOT NULL)

ufpp_exactly_one_actor.name: ufpp_exactly_one_actor
